external_claims_status: BLOCKED until scale + held-out-model gates pass

corpus_statistics.terminology_note: 'stochastic_observation_draws' are NOT additional GPU executions; only physical_base_captures are real local-gpu collects.

corpus_statistics_single_draw.terminology_note: 'single_draw_per_base' are NOT additional GPU executions; only physical_base_captures are real local-gpu collects.

observer_aggregation_labels.host_observer_realistic_mean_draw: GENEROUS upper bound: mean of N stochastic observer draws per physical base capture
observer_aggregation_labels.host_observer_realistic_single_draw: REALISTIC: one stochastic observer draw per physical base capture (observation_idx=0)

architecture_labeling_audit.explanation: architecture_id vs model_class disagreement on legacy 2-arch corpus: model_class is a coarse bucket aligned with train/infer volume; architecture_id can track config bundles. Only architecture_id is canonical for fingerprint claims after >=8 physical architectures.

gate_summary.architecture_inference_headline: BLOCKED until >=8 physical architectures and held-out-model PASS on architecture_id
gate_summary.detector_headline: Phase 2 hard suites only (not trivial mode-change AUC)
gate_summary.phase_3: NOT_APPROVED — re-collect on 10-arch corpus then re-run gates

host_observer_realistic_mean_draw.notes: model_class confounded with mode/volume — see docs/architecture_labeling_audit.md

host_observer_realistic_single_draw.notes: model_class confounded with mode/volume — see docs/architecture_labeling_audit.md

host_observer_realistic.notes: model_class confounded with mode/volume — see docs/architecture_labeling_audit.md

held_out_model_evaluation.split: entire architecture_id held out of train; test rows are only unseen architectures (single-draw realistic observer)
held_out_model_evaluation.model_class_status: RETRACTED — confounded with volume/mode; not a fingerprint axis

architecture_id.notes: NEGATIVE: held-out-model does not generalize — honest bounding result

model_class.notes: NEGATIVE: test fold has a single class (holdout did not include all label values) RETRACTED: model_class not reported as fingerprint result

held_out_model_evaluation.gate_status: PRELIMINARY — interpret held-out accuracy; no external fingerprint claim until PASS

ablation_interpretation.mode: Coarse volume leakage: total-bytes ablation within 5% of full realistic features.
ablation_interpretation.model_class: Volume channel dominates; fine-grained claim not supported.
ablation_interpretation.seq_length: Coarse volume leakage: total-bytes ablation within 5% of full realistic features.

split_policy: config stratified (inference); held_out_model uses architecture_id split
